_note: Feature extraction parity fixtures. Populated in Phase 3 step 4 after ml/nba/features.py and src/ml/features.ts are implemented. Run with --capture to generate expected outputs.
_how_to_populate: 1. Implement ml/nba/features.py with interface: python ml/nba/features.py --fixtures <path> --output <path>
2. Implement src/ml/features.ts exporting extractFeatures(fixture: FeatureFixture): FeatureVector
3. Run: npx tsx scripts/feature-extraction-parity.test.ts --capture to generate expected vectors
5. CI gate: run without --capture to verify parity on every feature-extraction commit

_input_schema.home_rolling_games: array of box stat rows (N most recent games for home team as of as_of_date)
_input_schema.away_rolling_games: array of box stat rows (N most recent games for away team as of as_of_date)
